title: AgriTech: Crops (Legacy)
description: ⚠️ This mod is no longer maintained. AgriTech (standalone) supersedes it.
body:
⚠️ This mod is no longer maintained.
AgriTech (standalone) supersedes this mod and its sister mod, combining both into a single, improved package with new features, expanded mod compatibility, and a cleaner codebase. Install that instead.

[Click here for AgriTech →](https://modrinth.com/mod/agritech)
